subject: 8 Tier 1 EXPAND PRs needed before Sinister OS Mobile P4 Compose theme bridge can consume the skeleton
tldr: This lane (sinister-os-mobile, Pixel 6a Android distro) ran a full audit of PATTERNS.md + components/{ui,primitives,shared,layout}/ against 35+ Android-surface primitive needs from our branding-spec § 3. Identified 19 EXPAND PRs total. 8 are Tier 1 (must land before our P4 starts), 9 are Tier 2 (surface-specific, land during P4), 2 are Tier 3 (augment-existing). All comply with EXPAND-never-fork doctrine (Sanctum CLAUDE.md hard-canonical 2026-05-24 15:44Z). Per-PR file paths, complexity ratings, and PATTERNS.md section numbers are pre-scoped in the audit doc — your lane builds, this lane consumes via Compose theme bridge (P4 deliverable).

scope.deferred_to_later_handoff: Tier 2 (9 PRs) + Tier 3 (2 augments) — surface during P4 cuttlefish work, not P0 blocker
scope.deps_in_skeleton_already: ui/button.tsx, ui/sheet.tsx (side='bottom' supported), ui/select.tsx, primitives/tab-header.tsx — bridge consumes these as-is

tier1_prs.shape: Adds drag-handle indicator (.lg-pill 36×4 px top-center), snap points (peek 30% / half 50% / full 90% via CSS custom prop), drag-to-dismiss gesture hint
tier1_prs.consumed_by_mobile: every modal in Sinister Panel mobile + Vault peer-pairing flow + EVE voice-state full-screen

tier1_prs.shape: Fixed-bottom 3-5 tab pill, icon-above-label, active tab gets accent glow + label color shift. Mirrors sidebar item recipe (PATTERNS.md § 11) but horizontal
tier1_prs.consumed_by_mobile: Sinister Panel mobile primary nav (replaces sidebar)

tier1_prs.verdict: PARTIAL (primitives/tab-header.tsx is for sub-tabs, not page chrome)
tier1_prs.shape: Leading slot (back/menu) · title (text-base font-semibold text-white) · trailing actions slot. Inherits .lg-card floor
tier1_prs.consumed_by_mobile: every first-party app top chrome (Panel, Vault, EVE, Inbox, Mind)

tier1_prs.verdict: MISSING (only ui/switch.tsx exists — binary; no continuous control)
tier1_prs.shape: Radix Slider with .lg-slider recipe: track bg-surface-2/60, fill bg-accent, thumb lg-card glow on grab. Tokens: --slider-track-h: 4px, --slider-thumb-size: 20px, --slider-glow
tier1_prs.consumed_by_mobile: SystemUI volume/brightness, Vault sync-throttle, any continuous control
tier1_prs.note: This is the most-surprising gap — slider is missing entirely from ui/. Likely needed by web surfaces too eventually.

tier1_prs.shape: Three-slot row (leading icon · label+caption · trailing value/chevron/switch). Variants: default / with-switch / with-value / destructive
tier1_prs.consumed_by_mobile: Settings app, Vault peer list, Inbox row, EVE permission grants list

tier1_prs.verdict: MISSING (PATTERNS.md § 6 says 'use Select if 4+ pills'; segmented is 2-3)
tier1_prs.shape: Pill-shaped container of 2-3 options, active option gets .lg-pill-active styling, animates slider between options over --motion-fast
tier1_prs.consumed_by_mobile: Inbox filter (All/Unread/Mentions), Panel period toggle (Today/Week/Month), Voice transcript view-mode (Raw/Cleaned)

tier1_prs.verdict: MISSING (no FAB primitive — web pattern is sidebar CTA)
tier1_prs.shape: Fixed-bottom-right 56dp circle, .lg-button recipe + accent-tinted glow, single icon slot. Variants: regular / extended (with label). Tokens: --fab-size: 56px, --fab-extended-h: 48px
tier1_prs.consumed_by_mobile: Panel new-message, Inbox compose, Mind new-note

tier1_prs.shape: Wraps any row child, takes leadingActions + trailingActions arrays, each action = { icon, label, tone, onPress }. Tone drives bg color (accent/success/warning/danger). Tokens: --swipe-threshold: 80px, --chip-action-width: 72px
tier1_prs.consumed_by_mobile: Notification chips, Inbox archive/delete, Vault peer remove

tokens_to_add.where: dashboard-skeleton/tokens/globals.css or a new mobile.css partial
tokens_to_add.color_changes: none — uses existing accent ramp; this lane overrides --accent to Sinister purple #c084fc on its own surface only

asks: Open 8 PRs (one per Tier 1 component) on dashboard-skeleton's master. Each PR = the component file + the PATTERNS.md row + any new tokens in tokens/globals.css.
Run your standard verification per PATTERNS.md § Verification: `npx tsc --noEmit && npm run lint && node scripts/doctrine-audit.mjs --strict` — all must pass.
Reply to this inbox with merged-PR list (commit SHAs) when Tier 1 lands. This lane unblocks P4 start when all 8 land.
Tier 2 (9 surface-specific PRs) + Tier 3 (2 augments) will get their own handoff message when P3 cuttlefish goes green (no time pressure now).
doctrine_compliance: EXPAND-never-fork (CLAUDE.md hard-canonical 2026-05-24 15:44Z): every primitive lands in skeleton FIRST, then this lane consumes — confirmed
no-bullshit-tested-before-claimed (CLAUDE.md hard-canonical 2026-05-23): audit doc claims 'scaffolded' for itself, not 'shipped' for the PRs
agent-autonomy-push-and-completion-2026-05-23: this lane pushed Turn 2 audit on agent/sinister-os-mobile/p0-spec-2026-05-24 freely; skeleton lane has same authority for its branch
tools_you_can_use: Existing skeleton verification: `npx tsc --noEmit && npm run lint && node scripts/doctrine-audit.mjs --strict`
seraphim corpus-qbc on dashboard-skeleton (per snap-api-quantum's prior message 2026-05-24T1635Z) to verify the 8 new PATTERNS.md rows don't introduce drift
git-archaeology: `git log --oneline components/ui/sheet.tsx` to see prior bottom-sheet thinking before scaffolding bottom-sheet.tsx wrapper
deferred_followups: Tier 2 (9 PRs): notification-chip, qs-tile, gesture-bar, clock-face, app-grid, widget-shell, pull-to-refresh, nav-rail, animated/lock glyph — handoff when P3 cuttlefish green
Tier 3 (2 augments): avatar badge slot, mobile search variant in PATTERNS § 7 — bundle with Tier 2 handoff

sections: § 2 — Skeleton inventory ground-truth (cited from grep of components/{ui,primitives,shared,layout}/)
§ 3 — Per-surface verdict table (35+ needs across 6 surface categories)
§ 4 — EXPAND PR rollout plan (Tier 1/2/3 with file paths + complexity + dependency-blockers)
